meaning: n.长度单位(6英尺)vt.测量深度,看穿,彻底了解vi.测深,进行探索
examples: A sea kayaker navigates the rocks around Flowerpot Island in Ontario's Fathom Five National Marine Park.
We're trying to fathom out what's going on.
He couldn't fathom out what the man could possibly mean.
Too many economists can't fathom that trade numbers in and of themselves are meaningless.
It is difficult to fathom that Apple executives have their heads buried in the sand.
